name: generate_report_with_gamma
description: Generate a professional report (or Gamma-style presentation/doc) using ONLY the desired effect: report topic/query + design_type (report). Leverages real Canva MCP generate capabilities for high-quality visual + text reports (charts, structured content). No manual design steps, no choosing templates first. The TASK calls grok_com_canva__generate-design with design_type='report' (or 'presentation'/'doc' for variants), passes detailed query, optional brand_kit, length. Returns design candidates. Follow-up can use create-design-from-candidate + editing tools. Reusable for any 'produce a report on X' need.

query.description: Detailed description of the report content and intent, e.g. 'Q2 2026 connector ecosystem status and taskmaster adoption metrics with charts'

design_type.description: Canva design type: 'report' (default, data viz report), 'presentation', 'doc', 'proposal' etc. See canva generate-design enum.

brand_kit_id.description: Optional brand kit id for on-brand output. First list-brand-kits if needed.

steps.description: Map query + design_type='report' (or override) + length + brand to the exact params for generate.

Call grok_com_canva__generate-design with query, design_type, length, brand_kit_id, user_intent='Generate professional report via TASK generate_report_with_gamma'. This produces candidates (job_id + candidate_ids). Real Canva generation, not sim.
Optionally follow with grok_com_canva__create-design-from-candidate using job_id + chosen candidate_id to persist to user's Canva account. Then editing_transaction tools for tweaks.
Use track_task_in_linear or github comment to record that the report TASK completed, with links to the design.

example_invocation: {generate_report_with_gamma; query=Status of all TASK definitions and podman MCPs in grok-super-taskmaster; design_type=report; length=balanced}
note: Gamma-like output achieved via Canva's report generation which produces polished docs/presentations suitable for sharing as 'Gamma' style decks. Uses real generate-design tool.
